Title: HELMETS - VE.3.2
Description: Closed-face with integral chin guard. Face shield integral with helmet. Specification per VE.3.2.

Title: BALACLAVA - VE.3.3.3
Description: Required for all drivers. Flame resistant material. Covers head neck and hair.

Title: BRAKES - T.3
Description: Single pedal actuates all 4 wheels. Two separate hydraulic circuits. No brake-by-wire.
